title: ActionProposal
description: A structured request from an agent to the Governance server to perform a governed action. Architecture Document Section 3.3.1.

action_id.description: UUID generated by the proposing agent. Must be unique per proposal.

action_class.description: The action class being proposed (e.g., 'cad_update.address'). Must exist in the action_class registry.

proposed_payload.description: Action-class-specific payload. Must conform to the action_class's payload_schema in the registry.

evidence_refs.description: At least one evidence reference supporting the proposed action.

p_correct.description: Agent's overall confidence in the proposed action (0.0-1.0).

conflict.description: True if the agent detects contradictory information across evidence_refs.

read_set.description: Version snapshot for optimistic concurrency control.

record_version.description: Episode-level version counter at the time the agent read state.

field_versions.description: Per-field version counters for the fields being written. Keys are field names, values are integer versions.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent configuration.

autonomy_level.description: Autonomy level of the proposing agent.
